description: Change the password of an existing VeraCrypt encrypted container using the GUI. In the VeraCrypt main window, go to the 'Volumes' menu and select 'Change Volume Password...'. Select the volume file /home/ga/Volumes/test_volume.hc. Enter the current password 'OldPassword123' and set the new password to 'NewSecure2024'. Keep the default PIM and hash algorithm settings, then click OK to apply the change.
